title.ko: 시간 또는 출석 등록; 기계 작업 등록 또는 표시; 난수의 발생; 투표 또는 추첨장치; 다른 개소에 속하지 않는 검사를 위한 배열, 시스템(system) 또는 장치
title.en: TIME OR ATTENDANCE REGISTERS; REGISTERING OR INDICATING THE WORKING OF MACHINES; GENERATING RANDOM NUMBERS; VOTING OR LOTTERY APPARATUS; ARRANGEMENTS, SYSTEMS OR APPARATUS FOR CHECKING NOT PROVIDED FOR ELSEWHERE

definition.ko: 어떤 일이 일어난 시간 또는 경과시간의 등록 G07C1/00 기계 가동의 등록; 차량 가동의 등록; 그들의 세부 G07C3/00, G07C5/00, G07C7/00 개개의 출입 등록 G07C9/00 다른 데에 속하지 않는 검사장치 G07C11/00 투표기; 난수발생기, 추첨기 G07C13/00; 15/00

title.ko: 어떤 일이 생긴 시간이나 경과시간의 등록, 표시 또는 기록, 예. 근로자의 시간 기록기(time recorder) (기계나 차량의 가동을 등록 또는 표시 G07C 3/00, G07C 5/00)
title.en: Registering, indicating, or recording the time of events or elapsed time, e.g. time-recorders for work people (registering or indicating the working of machines or vehicles G07C0003000000, G07C0005000000)
not involving the registering, indicating, or recording of other data
wherein the time is indicated in figures
with apparatus adapted for use with individual cards
wherein the time is indicated by marking an element, e.g. a card or tape, in a position determined by the time
together with the recording, indicating or registering of other data, e.g. of signs of identity
wherein the time is indicated in figures
with apparatus adapted for use with individual cards
wherein the time is indicated by marking an element, e.g. a card or tape, in a position determined by the time
with apparatus adapted for use with individual cards
Checking timed patrols, e.g. of watchman
in connection with sports or games
Race time-recorders
Pigeon-timing or like equipment
Indicating playing time

title.ko: 주차계기(운행중인 차량이 대기시간을 등록 또는 표시하는 것 G07C 5/02; 동전 투입식 주차 계기 G07F 17/24)
title.en: Parking meters (registering or indicating waiting time of vehicles by means driven by the vehicle G07C0005020000;coin-freed parking meters G07F0017240000)
Time-recording locks
Registering or indicating the condition or the working of machines or other apparatus, other than vehicles
Registering or indicating working or idle time only
using counting means or digital clocks
in graphical form
Registering or indicating the production of the machine either with or without registering working or idle time
using counting means
in graphical form
Quality control systems
Registering or indicating the working of vehicles
Registering or indicating driving, working, idle, or waiting time only (apparatus forming part of taximeters G07B0013000000)
using counting means or digital clocks
in graphical form
Registering or indicating performance data other than driving, working, idle, or waiting time, with or without registering driving, working, idle, or waiting time
using counting means or digital clocks
in graphical form

title.ko: 그룹 G07C3/00과 G07C5/00의 등록 또는 지시기기에 공통하는 부품 또는 부속품
title.en: Details or accessories common to the registering or indicating apparatus of groups G07C0003000000 and G07C0005000000
Individual registration on entry or exit
Movable barriers with registering means
with arrangements to prevent the passage of more than one individual at a time
involving the use of a pass
having a variable access code
in combination with an identity check of the pass holder
by means of a password
by means of a handwritten signature
using biometric data, e.g. fingerprints, iris scans or voice recognition
using a biometric sensor integrated in the pass
with central registration
the pass enabling tracking or indicating presence
the pass containing active electronic elements, e.g. smartcards
not involving the use of a pass
in combination with an identity check
by means of a password
by means of a handwritten signature
using biometric data, e.g. fingerprints, iris scans or voice recognition
with central registration
Arrangements, systems or apparatus for checking, e.g. the occurrence of a condition, not provided for elsewhere
Voting apparatus
Ballot boxes
Generating random numbers; Lottery apparatus
